---
name: Corrupt Saves
about: Anything related to corrupt saves not being able to be fixed with the script.
title: ''
labels: corruption
assignees: ''

---

**If you use any mods, please make sure to delete them *completely* before creating the issue here**

**Describe the problem**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. *Please include any errors from the game that appear when loading in with that save*.

**Describe what happened up to the save getting corrupted**
For example, the game crashed during a mission.
